title: 30o: download_blob drops {type} template variable
description: Location: crates/jmap-chat/src/blob.rs lines 136-143. RFC 8620 §6.2 specifies the download URL template contains {accountId}, {blobId}, {name}, and {type}. download_blob substitutes only the first three; {type} is never substituted. The expand_url_template test in blob.rs line 231 even covers {type} substitution (the image/png case), but the actual download_blob API has no type parameter. Why burden: a maintainer adding content-type negotiation will expect to pass {type} as they do {name}, but there is no parameter slot. The connection between the test that covers {type} expansion and the download_blob function that omits it will confuse anyone debugging download URL construction. Suggested fix: add an optional accept_type parameter to download_blob (or document explicitly that {type} substitution is intentionally omitted and the template variable will remain literal).
close_reason: fixed: added accept_type: Option<&str> parameter to download_blob
